description: Extends a line by a given proportion in one or both directions
utility: Lengthens, shortens, or adjusts line endpoints based on proportional scaling

arguments.name: graph
arguments.description: The 2D graph to draw the extended line on

arguments.name: line (or p1)
arguments.description: Either a line expression or first point of line

arguments.name: proportion (or p2)
arguments.description: Extension proportion (when second arg is line), or second point (when second arg is point)

arguments.name: startProportion (or proportion)
arguments.description: Extension proportion for start point. If omitted with two points, treated as single proportion

arguments.name: endProportion
arguments.description: Extension proportion for end point (when extending in both directions)

alternates.description: Extend line from end point. proportion > 1 extends beyond, < 1 shortens
Extend from both start and end with different proportions
Define line from two points, then extend
Define line from points and extend in both directions

examples.scenario: Extend a line 50% longer from the end

examples.expression: G = g2d(-10, 10, -10, 10); A = point(G, 1, 1); B = point(G, 3, 3); extendline(G, A, B, 2)
